acceptance_criteria.text: Add a persisted business-scoped Operator consent policy table for paid action keys without touching credit ledger or execution paths.
gaps: Production migration not applied in this local run.

acceptance_criteria.text: Add a backend service that validates consent modes, action keys, and credit limits. auto_with_limits must require explicit positive limits.
proof: Added validation service and unit tests.
gaps: Runtime spend checks remain future execution work.

acceptance_criteria.text: Add authenticated Operator API endpoints to read and update consent policies after verifying business access.
proof: Added authenticated read/update Operator consent policy endpoints.
gaps: No live Postgres API integration test.

acceptance_criteria.text: Include the current consent policy in paid action offers returned by the attention brief.
proof: Attention brief paid action offers include current_consent_policy.

acceptance_criteria.text: Add web Operator controls to choose ask_each_time, auto_with_limits, or disabled and save limits for a paid action offer.
proof: Operator web page renders consent mode and limit controls; frontend build passed.

acceptance_criteria.text: Tests and proof evidence must show no paid provider calls, credit charges, AI generation, or external publication were added.
proof: Tests/build passed; no provider, charge, generation, or publication paths added.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_consent_policy.py tests/test_operator_paid_actions.py tests/test_operator_attention.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py

python3 -m py_compile src/services/operator_consent_policy.py src/services/operator_paid_actions.py src/services/operator_attention.py src/api/operator_api.py src/services/telegram_dashboard.py alembic_migrations/versions/20260520_add_operator_consent_policies.py
known_gaps: No paid execution, Apify call, cost ingestion, credit charge, generation, or external publication in Sprint 4.
Production deployment and migration application were not requested in this turn.
